CreatureTypeTables.Name: Harvest Table Entries
CreatureTypeTables.Hint: Stores Roll Table UUID entries mapped to creature types.

Menu.Name: Creature Type Tables
Menu.Label: Assign Roll Tables
Menu.Hint: Assign Roll Table UUIDs to creature types. Exact matches are preferred, then ALL is used as a fallback.

AutoRollHarvest.Name: Fast Forward Harvest Checks
AutoRollHarvest.Hint: If enabled, harvest skill checks skip the configuration dialog.

AutoEnableQuantityOnNewTables.Name: Auto-Enable Quantity Data on New RollTables
AutoEnableQuantityOnNewTables.Hint: If enabled, newly created RollTables default to Quantity Data enabled.

RollTableCompendium.Name: Preferred RollTable Folder
RollTableCompendium.Hint: Used as a fallback source when a row does not resolve to a RollTable compendium.

HarvestAttemptsBySize.Name: Max Harvest Attempts ({size})
HarvestAttemptsBySize.Hint: Maximum number of harvest checks allowed against a {size} creature before further attempts are blocked.

Menu.Name: Max Harvest Attempts by Size
Menu.Label: Attempts per Size Menu
Menu.Hint: Configure maximum harvest checks allowed for each D&D5e creature size.
Menu.HintWithDefaultBehavior: Configure maximum harvest checks allowed for each D&D5e creature size. Leave a field empty to use that size default (DND5E numerical, minimum 1).

Debug.Name: Debug Logging
Debug.Hint: Enable verbose BBH debug/info logs in the browser console.

OpenTablesModifier.Name: Open Harvester Tables Modifier
OpenTablesModifier.Hint: Hold this key while clicking the Harvester token control button to open Creature Type Tables.

TABLES.Hint: Add harvest table entries. Choose a creature type, or use ALL to share one table across all creature types. Drag a Roll Table into the UUID field.
TABLES.CustomTypePromptHint: Use a lowercase key. You can match subtype-specific entries using value:subtype (example: dragon:red, silver).
TABLES.UuidPlaceholder: Drop a Roll Table here or paste its UUID

ROLL_TABLE.HarvestDataHint: Expose harvest skill and DC fields on this Roll Table and allow it to be used for harvest resolution.
ROLL_TABLE.QuantityDataHint: Expose quantity fields on this Roll Table for result rewards.

RESULTS.ApplySelectedSkillToAllAria: Apply selected skill to all results

RESULT_CONFIG.HarvestSkillHint: Skill check required to harvest this result.
RESULT_CONFIG.HarvestDcHint: Difficulty class for the harvest check.
RESULT_CONFIG.QuantityHint: Fixed number or roll formula applied before the linked item is created.

WARN.NoHarvestTableForType: No harvest table is configured for creature type "{creatureType}".
WARN.ResultMissingSkillOrDc: Result "{resultName}" on "{tableName}" is missing a harvest skill or DC.
WARN.ResultMissingItemLink: Result "{resultName}" on "{tableName}" is not linked to an Item document.

SelectOne.Actor: Select a Token before attempting to harvest.
SelectOne.Target: Select exactly one Target to harvest.
SelectOne.TargetActor: This Targeted Token references an Actor which no longer exists within the World.
SelectOne.Creature: This Targeted Token references an Actor which is not a Creature

WARN.HarvestPayloadUnresolved: The harvest request could not be resolved from its stored data.
WARN.TargetMustBeAtZeroHp: Target must have 0 HP or less to be harvested.
WARN.NoHarvestableResultsRemaining: No harvestable results remain for this target and table.
WARN.HarvestTableMissingResultConfig: Harvest table "{tableName}" has no usable results: missing {details}. Configure BBH result Skill/DC flags on table results.
WARN.HarvestAttemptsReached: {targetName} cannot be harvested again. Maximum attempts reached ({maxAttempts}).
WARN.DropRollTable: Drop a Roll Table document here.
WARN.TableNameOrUuidNotResolved: Value did not resolve to a Roll Table UUID or exact table name.
WARN.UuidNotRollTable: UUID did not resolve to a Roll Table.
WARN.SelectTargetsOrControlledForReset: Select token(s) and/or target token(s) to reset harvested results.

CHAT.SelectSkillPrompt: Choose a skill check to attempt harvest:
